1.title: Open Overall Upright Plumbness Evaluation Panel

content.text: System shall open the Overall Upright Plumbness – Evaluation Model side panel when the user selects the corresponding test from the Rules & Actions Testing list.
the evaluation panel to open when I select the Overall Upright Plumbness test
I can review the evaluation model configuration.
I am viewing the Rules & Actions → Testing list,
I select the Overall Upright Plumbness test,
the system opens the Overall Upright Plumbness – Evaluation Model side panel.
System shall display the test title “Overall Upright plumbness – G1 evaluation model” at the top of the panel.
the test title displayed at the top of the panel
I know which evaluation model I am viewing.
the system displays the title “Overall Upright plumbness – G1 evaluation model”.
System shall display the scope label “Global” for the G1 evaluation model.
the evaluation panel header is visible,
System shall display a short description indicating the model is derived from δ(z) survey data representing vertical deviation profile.
see a short description of the model
I understand the basis of the evaluation.
the system displays a description indicating the model is derived from δ(z) survey data representing vertical deviation profile.
System shall display a Measurement Basis section describing that deviation is “computed from deviation profile δ(z).”
I understand how deviation measurements are derived.
the system shows the Measurement Basis section.
System shall display the definition of δ(z) as – “deviation of upright from nominal position at height z derived from the survey engine.”
the Measurement Basis section is visible,
the system defines δ(z) as deviation of upright from nominal position at height z derived from the survey engine.
System shall display the Calculation Logic section in read-only mode.
the Calculation Logic section displayed in read-only mode
I can review the calculation model.
the system displays the Calculation Logic section in read-only mode.
System shall display the formula Δδ(zᵢ) = δ(zᵢ) − δ(z_base).
I understand how deviation is derived.
the Calculation Logic section is visible,
the system shows the formula Δδ(zᵢ) = δ(zᵢ) − δ(z_base).
System shall compute **maximum deviation Δδ_max = max (Δδ(zᵢ) )
the system to compute maximum deviation
the highest deviation value is identified.
it computes maximum deviation Δδ_max = max(Δδ(zᵢ)).
System shall compute Plumbness (mm/m) = Δδ_max / H_m.
the system to compute plumbness in mm/m
the deviation ratio can be evaluated.
Δδ_max and H_m values are available,
the system calculates Plumbness (mm/m) = Δδ_max / H_m.
System shall display a note explaining H_m represents measured upright height.
I understand the variable used in calculations.
the system indicates that H_m represents measured upright height.
System shall display a Threshold Configuration section for configuring allowable deviation parameters.
I can configure allowable deviation parameters.
the system displays the Threshold Configuration section.
System shall display the Allowable Deviation Formula: Allowable Deviation = H / [200] Divisor.
I understand how thresholds are derived.
the threshold configuration section is visible,
the system shows the formula Allowable Deviation = H / Divisor.
System shall provide a configurable Divisor field with default value 200.
I can adjust allowable deviation calculations.
the threshold configuration section is displayed,
the system provides a divisor field with default value 200.
System shall validate the divisor input to allow integer values only between minimum 100 and maximum 2000.
the system accepts only integer values between 100 and 2000.
System shall display an explanatory note describing that allowable deviation is calculated as upright height divided by divisor.
see an explanation of allowable deviation calculation
I understand how thresholds are derived.
the system indicates allowable deviation equals upright height divided by divisor.
System shall display an example calculation –
Allowable = 6000/200= 30 mm, illustrating deviation using sample values.
I understand how the formula works.
the threshold configuration section is visible,
the system shows the example calculation using sample values.
System shall display a Red Escalation Multiplier field with default value 1.5.
the threshold configuration section is visible,
the system shows the Red Escalation Multiplier field with default value 1.5.
System shall validate the Red Escalation Multiplier to accept numeric values between Minimum: 1.0 and Maximum: 3.0 with step increments of 0.1.
the system accepts numeric values between 1.0 and 3.0 with step increments of 0.1.
System shall display the escalation formula Red when Δδ_max > multiplier - 1.5 × (H / (Divisor).
I understand how Red severity is triggered.
the escalation configuration section is visible,
the system shows the Red escalation formula.
System shall display a Live Preview section (read-only) showing:
calculated allowable deviation and severity thresholds using example height.
the system displays calculated example thresholds.
System shall display calculated Green, Amber, and Red threshold ranges in the preview section.
the preview section to display Green, Amber, and Red ranges
the Live Preview section is visible,
the system displays the Green, Amber, and Red threshold ranges.
System shall display an Output Preview section showing automatically calculated output parameters.
the system displays the Output Preview section.
System shall display computed outputs including Upright Height (H_m), Δδ_max (mm): Auto Plumbness (mm/m): Auto, Governing Height (z_at_max): Auto and RAG: Auto.
the Output Preview section is visible,
the system shows Upright Height, Δδ_max, Plumbness, Governing Height, and RAG.
System shall provide Save Changes button to store modified threshold configuration values.
I can store modified configuration values.
the system saves the updated threshold configuration.
System shall provide Cancel button to discard changes and close the configuration panel.
the system discards the changes and closes the panel.
System shall provide a Close (X) icon to exit the panel.
I can exit the panel quickly.
the system shows a close (X) icon.
System shall display “Formula based threshold (height ratio model)” label at the bottom of the panel.
see a formula model label at the bottom
I understand the threshold model type.
the system shows the label “Formula based threshold (height ratio model)”.
